nasb.text: Woe to the worthless shepherd Who leaves the flock! A sword will be on his arm And on his right eye! His arm will be totally withered And his right eye will be blind.”

esv.text: “Woe to my worthless shepherd, who deserts the flock! May the sword strike his arm and his right eye! Let his arm be wholly withered, his right eye utterly blinded!”

cnv.text: “那丟棄羊群的無用牧人有禍了！ 願刀劍落在他的膀臂和他的右眼上； 願他的膀臂全然枯槁， 願他的右眼完全失明！”

ccb.text: “丢弃羊群的无用牧人有祸了！ 愿刀砍在他的臂膀和右眼上！ 愿他的臂膀彻底枯槁， 他的右眼完全失明！”
